customers_say: Customers find this water purifier excellent, with features including TDS control, multiple taste adjustment options, and a modern LED light design. They appreciate the free installation and consider it good value for money, with one customer noting it will pay off in three years. The purifier's reliability receives mixed feedback - while some say it functions well, others report it stops working.

reviews.author: Gopal U
reviews.title: Water Filter with brain :)
reviews.body: Excellent product with a very smart and practical design. The functioning is equally smart and efficient, especially in terms of minimal water wastage compared to conventional models. It feels thoughtfully engineered for everyday use. The design also blends beautifully with modern home decor and gives a clean, premium look to the space. Overall, a perfect combination of utility, aesthetics, and efficiency. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Riyaz ahmad
reviews.title: Value to money
reviews.body: Using the Atomberg water purifier for some time now and really happy with the performance. The water tastes fresh and clean, maintenance is easy, and the design looks modern too. Definitely a good choice for home use. Installation was very convenient, Installation guy did each and everything by himself... Great service and great producy

reviews.author: Ritwik
reviews.title: Quality and Aesthetic Product with Great Service Support! Thank You Atomberg!
reviews.body: 1 Month Review it is. Installation and all was so Prompt and professional. Had an issue with the Flow sensor within a month, complaint raised via app was an easy process after running diagnosis. Within 24Hrs of raising the ticket got the service expert at our door. When he checked the flow pressure was low and had to install an extra pressure Pump to maintain the required PSI. Luckily we got a thoughtfull technician and he had the pump along with him and Installation done at no Extra cost. Highly Recommended Product.

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: GOOD SERVICE BY ATOMBERG Technician
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Atomberg water purifier and I am completely satisfied with its performance. The design is modern and fits perfectly in my kitchen. The purification quality is very good and the water tastes fresh and clean. The noise level is moderate and does not disturb at all during operation. The purifier also includes a TDS control feature, which helps maintain the right minerals in the water and improves the taste. After using it, we feel the water is much safer and better for health and daily drinking. Installation service was also excellent. Technician Kamleshbhai did a very go

reviews.author: Piyush
reviews.title: Atomberg water purifier
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Atomberg Water Purifier and I’m extremely satisfied with my experience so far. The installation process was smooth and hassle-free, and the design looks modern and fits perfectly in my kitchen. Most importantly, the water quality is excellent — it tastes fresh, clean, and gives me confidence about its purity. The purifier works efficiently and quietly, which is a big plus. I also appreciate the build quality and the overall value for money this product offers. It feels like a reliable long-term investment for my family’s health.
